name: @blocksifrdev/ttp-protocol
description: Trust Transfer Protocol — platform-agnostic trust proof, decay, delegation, and verification primitives for agentic execution governance

scripts.check:examples: node src/index.js check examples/01-basic-agent.ttp && node src/index.js check examples/02-trust-decay.ttp && node src/index.js check examples/03-threshold-proof.ttp && node src/index.js check examples/04-delegated-trust.ttp && node src/index.js check examples/05-frontdesk-authority-context.ttp
